'''鈭歴h-t-l''' ('''shatala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yabble|yabble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-t-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yabble|yabble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-t-l
|-
! Lemma
| shatala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatalithi|shatalithi]] || [[word:shataliji|shataliji]] || [[word:shatalishi|shatalishi]] || [[word:shatali|shatali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shataluthuth|shataluthuth]] || [[word:shatalujuj|shatalujuj]] || [[word:shatalushush|shatalushush]] || [[word:shatal|shatal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shataluthu|shataluthu]] || [[word:shataluju|shataluju]] || [[word:shatalushu|shatalushu]] || [[word:shatalu|shatalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shatalufuth|shatalufuth]] || [[word:shatalufuj|shatalufuj]] || [[word:shatalufush|shatalufush]] || [[word:shataluf|shataluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatalethe|shatalethe]] || [[word:shataleje|shataleje]] || [[word:shataleshe|shataleshe]] || [[word:shatale|shatale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shatalothoth|shatalothoth]] || [[word:shatalojoj|shatalojoj]] || [[word:shataloshosh|shataloshosh]] || [[word:shatal|shatal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shatalotho|shatalotho]] || [[word:shatalojo|shatalojo]] || [[word:shatalosho|shatalosho]] || [[word:shatalo|shatalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shatalofoth|shatalofoth]] || [[word:shatalofoj|shatalofoj]] || [[word:shatalofosh|shatalofosh]] || [[word:shatalof|shatalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatal忙th忙|shatal忙th忙]] || [[word:shatal忙j忙|shatal忙j忙]] || [[word:shatal忙sh忙|shatal忙sh忙]] || [[word:shatal忙|shatal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shatalathath|shatalathath]] || [[word:shatalajaj|shatalajaj]] || [[word:shatalashash|shatalashash]] || [[word:shatal|shatal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shatalatha|shatalatha]] || [[word:shatalaja|shatalaja]] || [[word:shatalasha|shatalasha]] || [[word:shatala|shatala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shatalafath|shatalafath]] || [[word:shatalafaj|shatalafaj]] || [[word:shatalafash|shatalafash]] || [[word:shatalaf|shatalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shatalasha|shatalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatalasha|goshatalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatalasha|gokishatalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shataln眉sha|shataln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatalnkn眉sha|goshatalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishataln眉sha|gokishataln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatalsh毛sha|shatalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatalnksh毛sha|goshatalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatalsh毛sha|gokishatalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatalrosha|shatalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatalnkrosha|goshatalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatalrosha|gokishatalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatalmusha|shatalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatalnkmusha|goshatalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatalmusha|gokishatalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatalsherasha|shatalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatalnksherasha|goshatalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatalsherasha|gokishatalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatalngasha|shatalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatalnkngasha|goshatalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatalngasha|gokishatalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatalyasha|shatalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatalnkyasha|goshatalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatalyasha|gokishatalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatalyamasha|shatalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatalnkyamasha|goshatalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatalyamasha|gokishatalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shataln眉sh毛sha|shataln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatalnkn眉sh毛sha|goshatalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishataln眉sh毛sha|gokishataln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shataln眉rosha|shataln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatalnkn眉rosha|goshatalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishataln眉rosha|gokishataln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shataln眉musha|shataln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatalnkn眉musha|goshatalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishataln眉musha|gokishataln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatalsh毛n眉sha|shatalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatalnksh毛n眉sha|goshatalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatalsh毛n眉sha|gokishatalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatalsh毛rosha|shatalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatalnksh毛rosha|goshatalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatalsh毛rosha|gokishatalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatalsh毛musha|shatalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatalnksh毛musha|goshatalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatalsh毛musha|gokishatalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatalron眉sha|shatalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatalnkron眉sha|goshatalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatalron眉sha|gokishatalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatalrosh毛sha|shatalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatalnkrosh毛sha|goshatalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatalrosh毛sha|gokishatalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatalromusha|shatalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatalnkromusha|goshatalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatalromusha|gokishatalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatalmun眉sha|shatalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatalnkmun眉sha|goshatalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatalmun眉sha|gokishatalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatalmush毛sha|shatalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatalnkmush毛sha|goshatalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatalmush毛sha|gokishatalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatalmurosha|shatalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatalnkmurosha|goshatalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatalmurosha|gokishatalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shatal|shatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙t忙l|sh忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshatal|hoshatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙t忙l|hosh忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshatal|hohoshatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙t忙l|hohosh忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shatal|n眉shatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙t忙l|n眉sh忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shatal|n眉n眉shatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙t忙l|n眉n眉sh忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shatal|n茂shatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙t忙l|n茂sh忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shatal|n茂n茂shatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙t忙l|n茂n茂sh忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushatal|lushatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙t忙l|lush忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushatal|lulushatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙t忙l|lulush忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishatal|lishatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙t忙l|lish忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishatal|lilishatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙t忙l|lilish忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshatal|koshatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙t忙l|kosh忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshatal|kokoshatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙t忙l|kokosh忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshatal|keshatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙t忙l|kesh忙t忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshatal|kekeshatal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙t忙l|kekesh忙t忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
